workflow.name: Tax4US Content Spec to WordPress Draft Generator

parameters.subject: =Draft: {{ $('Build WordPress Payload').first().json.payload.title }}
parameters.message: =New draft created: {{ $('Update WP_Pages Table').first().json.URL }} Reply APPROVE {{ $('Build WordPress Payload').first().json.specId }} or CHANGES {{ $('Build WordPress Payload').first().json.specId }}:...

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36

parameters.text: You are a Tax4US content research and generation agent. For the given content spec, research the market landscape, analyze competitors, and generate comprehensive content. Use the Market Research Tool to find current trends and competitor information. Use the Competitor Analysis Tool to scrape competitor websites for insights. Generate structured JSON content with market insights integrated. Send notification email when complete.

parameters.subject: =WordPress Page Created: {{ $('Build WordPress Payload').first().json.payload.title }}
parameters.message:
=Page successfully created and published as draft:

Title: {{ $('Build WordPress Payload').first().json.payload.title }}
URL: {{ $('Update WP_Pages Table').first().json.URL }}
Language: {{ $('Build WordPress Payload').first().json.language }}
Spec ID: {{ $('Build WordPress Payload').first().json.specId }}

The page is ready for review in WordPress admin.

parameters.toolDescription: Search the web for current market trends, competitor information, and industry insights using Tavily AI search

issues.description: Trigger using old base name instead of base ID

fixes.description: Update baseId to use new base ID

steps.description: Change baseId from name reference to ID reference
Save the updated workflow using only minimal required fields
Verify trigger uses correct base ID
